disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe joint pain that migrates between multiple joints (wrists, MCPs, both knees) rather than staying fixed in one joint
trigger_question_examples: Which joints are affected and does the pain move around?
Is it one joint or several?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's my wrists, my knuckles and both knees, and it keeps moving from one to another through the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue that has left the patient bedbound this evening
trigger_question_examples: How is your energy?
How is this affecting what you can do?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely wiped out — I physically can't get out of bed tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known background of lupus-related joint disease without joint deformity
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing medical conditions?
Have you had joint problems like this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I have lupus and it affects my joints, but I've been told they aren't damaged or deformed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Missed several doses of the regular lupus preventer over the last week
trigger_question_examples: Have you been taking your usual lupus medication as prescribed?
Have you missed any doses recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I've been slack with my lupus tablets and missed a fair few this past week.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I take it most of the time, I think it's fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sharp chest pain that is worse on breathing in
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain, especially sharp pain when you breathe in?
Any pain in your chest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no chest pain at all, and nothing sharp when I breathe.

trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath at all?
Is your breathing normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing is normal, I'm not short of breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the urine and no cola/tea-coloured urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your urine colour, like dark, cola or tea coloured?
Any blood in your urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my urine looks normal, no blood or dark colour that I've noticed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fever, shaking chills or rigors
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or shaking chills?
Have you taken your temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No high fever — my thermometer said 37.2, and no shakes or chills.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No single joint that is bright red, tensely swollen and intensely hot to touch
trigger_question_examples: Is any one joint much worse than the others — very red, very swollen, or very hot?
Does one joint stand out as burning hot or bright red?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, they're all sore and a bit puffy but none of them is bright red or burning hot on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new facial (butterfly) rash and no mouth ulcers
trigger_question_examples: Any new rashes, especially on your face or cheeks?
Any mouth ulcers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No new rash on my face and no mouth ulcers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is struggling with self-care tonight because of pain and exhaustion
trigger_question_examples: Do you have anyone with you or nearby who can help tonight?
How are you managing at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and honestly I can barely get to the bathroom tonight.
